commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves a redacted iMessage Full Disk Access probe failure in non-sensitive health snapshots, adds health/status regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes at source level: current main receives an iMessage { ok: false, error } probe, drops it from includeSensitive=false snapshots, and the formatter then falls back to configured. I did not establish a live macOS denied-Full-Disk-Access run.
